# eFounders Design System

> The shared, brand-agnostic design-system base. Projects consume it via shadcn; the
> code is the source of truth. This file tells an AI agent where everything is.

## Start here
- How to use it: docs/USING-THE-DESIGN-SYSTEM.md (setup, onboarding, daily use)
- Conventions template: templates/CLAUDE.md (drop into a project so the agent builds on-brand)

## Tokens & components
- Tokens (the contract): app/globals.css — semantic shadcn tokens + in-house extensions,
  two tiers (primitives → semantic), light + dark.
- Component specs (agent-readable): docs/COMPONENTS.md — token intent + a fiche per bespoke component.
- Component code: registry/new-york/ — standard shadcn (themed) + bespoke (tag, stat, filter-bar, chat-*).
- Storybook (live reference): https://ds-registry-five.vercel.app

## Registry (machine-readable)
- Catalog: registry.json. Built items: public/r/*.json.
- Each built item carries a `meta` contract: status, props, variants, composition rules, related.
- Consume: `shadcn add @efounders/<name>` — registry URL https://ds-registry-five.vercel.app/r/{name}.json
- Query from an agent: the shadcn MCP (`shadcn mcp init --client claude`).

## Checks
- DS conformance gate: scripts/ds-check.mjs (`npm run ds-check`) + .github/workflows/ds-check.yml —
  hardcoded colors / unknown tokens fail the PR.
- Audit any repo's AI-readiness: the `/ds-audit` skill.
